title: Poa schultesii

intro: Poa schultesii, also known as Schultes' blue grass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms associated with arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The bioactive constituents of Poa schultesii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenes, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
